MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to: Phillip James Litchfeld, Pltff Pro Per re: failure to appear at the 9/24/01 Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference is scheduled today. There being no appearance or a response to the OSC filed, Court ordered Plaintiff sanctioned $250.00, failure to appear to the Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference and to in response to today's OSC. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)
